Operation 'getOptOuts' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is too vague and lacks context about what opt-outs represent in the business texting domain. Added clarity about the operation's purpose (checking unsubscribed contacts), what data is returned (opt-out collection with timestamps), and when an AI agent should use this operation. Improved summary to be more specific about the account scope.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the opt-out settings for the specified account, including contacts who have opted out of receiving messages. Returns a collection of opt-out records with contact information and opt-out timestamps. Use this to check which contacts have unsubscribed or requested to stop receiving messages.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague and lacks context about what opt-outs represent in the business texting domain. Added clarity about the operation's purpose (checking unsubscribed contacts), what data is returned (opt-out collection with timestamps), and when an AI agent should use this operation. Improved summary to be more specific about the account scope.

message: Operation 'updateOptOuts' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description lacks essential details for AI agent decision-making. Added clarity about what the operation modifies (contact opt-out status), what input is expected (OptOut request object), the business impact (contacts excluded from campaigns), and side effects (future message exclusion). Improved summary to specify that it manages contact opt-out status rather than generic 'opt-outs'.

data.description_suggestion: Updates opt-out settings for contacts in the specified account. Accepts an OptOut request object to add or modify opt-out records for specific contacts. This operation manages which contacts are excluded from receiving messages. Returns the updated opt-out configuration. Side effects: contacts marked as opted-out will be excluded from future message campaigns and broadcasts.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks essential details for AI agent decision-making. Added clarity about what the operation modifies (contact opt-out status), what input is expected (OptOut request object), the business impact (contacts excluded from campaigns), and side effects (future message exclusion). Improved summary to specify that it manages contact opt-out status rather than generic 'opt-outs'.

message: Operation 'closeConversation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects, missing_output_details. The current description is too minimal. It lacks information about what 'closing' means operationally (marking as inactive), the side effects (no new messages), what is returned, and the reversibility of the action. Added these details to help AI agents understand the full impact of this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Closes the specified conversation, marking it as inactive. The conversation will no longer receive new messages unless reopened. Returns the updated conversation object with closed status. This action is permanent until the conversation is explicitly reopened.
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal. It lacks information about what 'closing' means operationally (marking as inactive), the side effects (no new messages), what is returned, and the reversibility of the action. Added these details to help AI agents understand the full impact of this operation.

message: Operation 'reopenConversation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects, missing_output_details. The current description lacks context about what reopening accomplishes (restoring active status), the side effects (resuming message receipt), what is returned, and its relationship to the close operation. Enhanced to clarify the operational impact and return value for better AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Reopens a previously closed conversation, restoring its active status. The conversation will resume receiving new messages. Returns the updated conversation object with active status. This operation reverses a prior close action.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks context about what reopening accomplishes (restoring active status), the side effects (resuming message receipt), what is returned, and its relationship to the close operation. Enhanced to clarify the operational impact and return value for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'blockConversation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects, missing_output_details, missing_context. The current description is extremely vague and lacks critical operational context. It doesn't explain what blocking prevents, the side effects on message flow, what is returned, or how it differs from closing. Added comprehensive details about message prevention, contact behavior, return value, and relationship to other operations.

data.description_suggestion: Blocks the specified conversation, preventing further messages from being sent or received with the contact. The contact will be unable to initiate new messages. Returns the updated conversation object with blocked status. Blocking is distinct from closing and can be reversed by unblocking.
data.reasoning: The current description is extremely vague and lacks critical operational context. It doesn't explain what blocking prevents, the side effects on message flow, what is returned, or how it differs from closing. Added comprehensive details about message prevention, contact behavior, return value, and relationship to other operations.

message: Operation 'unblockConversation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects, missing_output_details. The current description lacks operational context about what unblocking enables (message flow restoration), the side effects on contact communication, what is returned, and its relationship to the block operation. Enhanced to clarify the full impact and return value for AI agent interpretability.

data.description_suggestion: Unblocks a previously blocked conversation, restoring normal message flow with the contact. The contact can resume sending and receiving messages. Returns the updated conversation object with unblocked status. This operation reverses a prior block action.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks operational context about what unblocking enables (message flow restoration), the side effects on contact communication, what is returned, and its relationship to the block operation. Enhanced to clarify the full impact and return value for AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'listCampaigns' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. The current description is too generic and lacks important details about pagination, what campaign information is included, and available filtering/sorting capabilities. Enhanced to provide context about the response structure and available query options that AI agents would need to effectively use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all messaging campaigns for the specified account. Returns campaign objects with details including name, status, recipient count, and scheduling information. Supports filtering and sorting options for campaign discovery and management.
data.reasoning: The current description is too generic and lacks important details about pagination, what campaign information is included, and available filtering/sorting capabilities. Enhanced to provide context about the response structure and available query options that AI agents would need to effectively use this operation.
